Uses of Class
png.ChunkType

  • Packages that use ChunkType 
    Package Description
    png
    Functionality for parsing and processing PNG image files is provided here.

    • Uses of ChunkType in png

      Fields in png with type parameters of type ChunkType 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private static java.util.EnumSet<ChunkType> PngParser.DEFAULT_CHUNK_FILTER 
      private java.util.EnumSet<ChunkType> ChunkHandler.requiredChunks 
      Methods in png that return ChunkType 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static ChunkType ChunkType.fromBytes(byte[] bytes)
      Returns the ChunkType matching the 4-byte array, or UNKNOWN if no match.
      ChunkType PngChunk.getType()
      Returns the chunk type.
      static ChunkType ChunkType.valueOf(java.lang.String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static ChunkType[] ChunkType.values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
      Methods in png with parameters of type ChunkType 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      private PngChunk ChunkHandler.addChunk(ChunkType chunkType, long length, int crc32, byte[] data, long offsetStart)
      Attaches a general or type-specific PNG chunk to the collection.
      boolean ChunkHandler.existsChunkType(ChunkType type)
      Checks if a chunk with the specified type has already been set.
      java.util.Optional<java.util.List<PngChunk>> ChunkHandler.getChunks(ChunkType type)
      Retrieves a list of specific chunks based on the specified type, for example: tEXt, iTXt, or eXIf etc.
      PngChunk PngDirectory.getFirstChunk(ChunkType type)
      Retrieves the first PngChunk in this directory whose ChunkType matches the specified chunk type.
      java.util.Optional<PngChunk> ChunkHandler.getFirstChunk(ChunkType type)
      Retrieves the first occurrence of the chunk matching the specified type.
      java.util.Optional<PngChunk> ChunkHandler.getLastChunk(ChunkType type)
      Retrieves the last occurrence of the chunk matching the specified type.
      Method parameters in png with type arguments of type ChunkType 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      private PngParser.PngChunkData PngParser.loadMetadata(java.util.EnumSet<ChunkType> chunkFilter)
      Loads the filtered metadata chunks from the PNG image file.
      Constructor parameters in png with type arguments of type ChunkType 
      Constructor Description
      ChunkHandler(java.nio.file.Path fpath, ByteStreamReader reader, java.util.EnumSet<ChunkType> requiredChunks, boolean strict)
      Constructs a handler to parse filtered chunks from a PNG image file stream.
      ChunkHandler(java.nio.file.Path fpath, java.util.EnumSet<ChunkType> requiredChunks)
      Instantiates a handler to parse the specified set of filtered chunks from a PNG file stream in lenient mode.
      ChunkHandler(java.nio.file.Path fpath, java.util.EnumSet<ChunkType> requiredChunks, boolean strict)
      Instantiates a handler to parse the specified set of filtered chunks from a PNG file stream.
